description: The Learning Path module: study paths, ordered units, progress, AI-generated unit content from the knowledge base or uploads.
detection_hint: learning path, study path, path module, units, roadmap, syllabus, generate path, path progress, knowledge base path

injection.system_prompt_fragment: Learning Paths: local artifacts with title, description, ordered units (goals, optional AI lesson text, completion). Progress = completed units. Generation may use knowledge-base or user docs; can run in background. UI: browse paths, open a path, sidebar units, mark progress. Prefer path-related tools when available instead of only describing steps.
